# Paidhu - The Edible Flower Co.

Discover premium quality edible flowers, saffron, and natural organic products at Paidhu.

## Core Sections
- Shop: https://paidhu.com/shop
- About Us: https://paidhu.com/shop/about-us
- Saffron Guidance: https://paidhu.com/saffron-guidance
- BYOC (Build Your Own Cart): https://paidhu.com/shop/byoc
